page_title: LCSD Sports Facilities Availability - SmartPlay HK OSS
page_description: Open-source availability checker for Hong Kong LCSD sports facilities including tennis, basketball, and badminton courts. Check real-time availability before booking on official LCSD SmartPlay website.
booking_confirmed_msg: You will be redirected to the LCSD SmartPlay website to complete your booking.
watcher_added_desc: You will be notified when this session becomes available.

watcher_modal.title: Add Availability Watcher
watcher_modal.desc: We will notify you immediately when this session becomes available.

no_venues: No venues available for this filter.
no_venues_hint: Try changing filters or select "All Facilities" to see more.
passed_hint: This time slot has already passed and cannot be booked.
official_source_disclaimer: Official website is the source of truth for availability.
